consts:
Latent-correction sidecar for hnerv_repack_latent.

Wire format (single blob, brotli'd):
  u16 n_pairs
  per pair: u8 dim_idx (0..27, or 255 = no correction), i8 delta_quantized (real = i8 * DELTA_SCALE)

At inflate time, for each pair p:
  if dim_idx[p] != 255:
      latents[p, dim_idx[p]] += delta_quantized[p] * DELTA_SCALE
doc:
Latent-correction sidecar for hnerv_repack_latent.

Wire format (single blob, brotli'd):
  u16 n_pairs
  per pair: u8 dim_idx (0..27, or 255 = no correction), i8 delta_quantized (real = i8 * DELTA_SCALE)

At inflate time, for each pair p:
  if dim_idx[p] != 255:
      latents[p, dim_idx[p]] += delta_quantized[p] * DELTA_SCALE

child_codes.name: encode_corrections
child_codes.doc:
out_dim, out_delta_q: int8 arrays of length 600. dim=0 + delta_q=0 means 'no correction'.
    Returns brotli-compressed blob.
child_codes.dis:
17           0 RESUME                   0

 20           2 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)
              4 LOAD_CONST               2 (None)
              6 IMPORT_NAME              0 (brotli)
              8 STORE_FAST               2 (brotli)

 21          10 LOAD_GLOBAL              3 (NULL + len)
             20 LOAD_FAST                0 (out_dim)
             22 CALL                     1
             30 STORE_FAST               3 (n)

 22          32 LOAD_GLOBAL              3 (NULL + len)
             42 LOAD_FAST                1 (out_delta_q)
             44 CALL                     1
             52 LOAD_FAST                3 (n)
             54 COMPARE_OP              40 (==)
             58 POP_JUMP_IF_TRUE         2 (to 64)
             60 LOAD_ASSERTION_ERROR
             62 RAISE_VARARGS            1

 24     >>   64 LOAD_GLOBAL              5 (NULL + np)
             74 LOAD_ATTR                6 (where)
             94 LOAD_FAST                1 (out_delta_q)
             96 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)
             98 COMPARE_OP              40 (==)
            102 LOAD_CONST               3 (255)
            104 LOAD_FAST                0 (out_dim)
            106 CALL                     3
            114 LOAD_ATTR                9 (NULL|self + astype)
            134 LOAD_GLOBAL              4 (np)
            144 LOAD_ATTR               10 (uint8)
            164 CALL                     1
            172 STORE_FAST               4 (dim_packed)

 25         174 LOAD_GLOBAL             13 (NULL + struct)
            184 LOAD_ATTR               14 (pack)
            204 LOAD_CONST               4 ('<H')
            206 LOAD_FAST                3 (n)
            208 CALL                     2
            216 LOAD_GLOBAL              5 (NULL + np)
            226 LOAD_ATTR               16 (stack)
            246 LOAD_FAST                4 (dim_packed)
            248 LOAD_FAST                1 (out_delta_q)
            250 LOAD_ATTR                9 (NULL|self + astype)
            270 LOAD_GLOBAL              4 (np)
            280 LOAD_ATTR               18 (int8)
            300 CALL                     1
            308 LOAD_ATTR               21 (NULL|self + view)
            328 LOAD_GLOBAL              4 (np)
            338 LOAD_ATTR               10 (uint8)
            358 CALL                     1
            366 BUILD_LIST               2
            368 LOAD_CONST               5 (1)
            370 KW_NAMES                 6 (('axis',))
            372 CALL                     2
            380 LOAD_ATTR               23 (NULL|self + tobytes)
            400 CALL                     0
            408 BINARY_OP                0 (+)
            412 STORE_FAST               5 (payload)

 26         414 LOAD_FAST                2 (brotli)
            416 LOAD_ATTR               25 (NULL|self + compress)
            436 LOAD_FAST                5 (payload)
            438 LOAD_CONST               7 (11)
            440 KW_NAMES                 8 (('quality',))
            442 CALL                     2
            450 RETURN_VALUE

child_codes.name: decode_corrections
child_codes.doc: Returns (dim_arr (n, int8), delta_q_arr (n, int8)). dim==255 means no correction.
child_codes.dis:
29           0 RESUME                   0

 31           2 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)
              4 LOAD_CONST               2 (None)
              6 IMPORT_NAME              0 (brotli)
              8 STORE_FAST               1 (brotli)

 32          10 LOAD_FAST                1 (brotli)
             12 LOAD_ATTR                3 (NULL|self + decompress)
             32 LOAD_FAST                0 (blob)
             34 CALL                     1
             42 STORE_FAST               2 (raw)

 33          44 LOAD_GLOBAL              5 (NULL + struct)
             54 LOAD_ATTR                6 (unpack_from)
             74 LOAD_CONST               3 ('<H')
             76 LOAD_FAST                2 (raw)
             78 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)
             80 CALL                     3
             88 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)

 34          96 LOAD_GLOBAL              9 (NULL + np)

            132 LOAD_CONST               4 (2)
            134 LOAD_FAST                3 (n)

            156 LOAD_ATTR               12 (uint8)

            206 LOAD_FAST                3 (n)

            218 STORE_FAST               4 (arr)

 35         220 LOAD_FAST                4 (arr)
            222 LOAD_CONST               2 (None)
            224 LOAD_CONST               2 (None)
            226 BUILD_SLICE              2
            228 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)
            230 BUILD_TUPLE              2
            232 BINARY_SUBSCR
            236 STORE_FAST               5 (dim)

 36         238 LOAD_FAST                4 (arr)
            240 LOAD_CONST               2 (None)
            242 LOAD_CONST               2 (None)
            244 BUILD_SLICE              2
            246 LOAD_CONST               6 (1)
            248 BUILD_TUPLE              2

            318 BUILD_TUPLE              2

child_codes.name: apply_corrections
child_codes.doc: In-place add correction to latents_tensor (n, latent_dim). dim==255 means no-op.
child_codes.dis:
40           0 RESUME                   0

 42           2 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)
              4 LOAD_CONST               2 (None)
              6 IMPORT_NAME              0 (torch)
              8 STORE_FAST               4 (torch)

 43          10 LOAD_FAST                0 (latents_tensor)
             12 LOAD_ATTR                2 (shape)
             32 LOAD_CONST               1 (0)
             34 BINARY_SUBSCR
             38 STORE_FAST               5 (n)

 44          40 LOAD_GLOBAL              5 (NULL + range)
             50 LOAD_FAST                5 (n)
             52 CALL                     1
             60 GET_ITER
        >>   62 FOR_ITER                52 (to 170)
             66 STORE_FAST               6 (p)

 45          68 LOAD_GLOBAL              7 (NULL + int)
             78 LOAD_FAST                1 (dim_arr)
             80 LOAD_FAST                6 (p)
             82 BINARY_SUBSCR
             86 CALL                     1
             94 STORE_FAST               7 (d)

 46          96 LOAD_FAST                7 (d)
             98 LOAD_CONST               3 (255)
            100 COMPARE_OP              40 (==)
            104 POP_JUMP_IF_FALSE        1 (to 108)

 47         106 JUMP_BACKWARD           23 (to 62)

 48     >>  108 LOAD_FAST                0 (latents_tensor)
            110 LOAD_FAST                6 (p)
            112 LOAD_FAST                7 (d)
            114 BUILD_TUPLE              2
            116 BINARY_SUBSCR
            120 LOAD_GLOBAL              9 (NULL + float)
            130 LOAD_FAST                2 (delta_q_arr)
            132 LOAD_FAST                6 (p)
            134 BINARY_SUBSCR
            138 CALL                     1
            146 LOAD_FAST                3 (scale)
            148 BINARY_OP                5 (*)
            152 BINARY_OP                0 (+)
            156 LOAD_FAST                0 (latents_tensor)
            158 LOAD_FAST                6 (p)
            160 LOAD_FAST                7 (d)
            162 BUILD_TUPLE              2
            164 STORE_SUBSCR
            168 JUMP_BACKWARD           54 (to 62)

 44     >>  170 END_FOR

 49         172 LOAD_FAST                0 (latents_tensor)
            174 RETURN_VALUE
